productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Absolutely enjoyed this book and will follow this author. He knows how to create a Word Search!!
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Absolutely loved working on this book. It is a small handheld book with 24 words per page. That means that there are not allot of unused letters in the grid. I have already ordered 3 more books by this author. This book was completed in 2 weeks while also working on another larger book with a large grid and less words per page. The font is very readable, the solutions are in the back and easily able to find a word needed. Each puzzle has a topic and the words are included based on that topic. It's made in the USA. Puzzle #66 had several two word phrases that were separated by a letter that was not included in the phrase - I had to verify this in the solutions to see if that was correct. I have never seen this before in the 20 some Word Search books that I have completed. This book also had 4 sample puzzles from a new book this author had recently completed for this user to see if I liked. I did and they are in one of the new books I have ordered.

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Varied themes, larger print, ABC word order
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Word search in large print is easier to see, seek and find. The paper feels & looks like good quality with a mid-weight thickness. The lettering is crisp and clear to see & read. The value for 224 puzzles is affordable, in my opinion. I like the bigger book size and much prefer them over smaller books. Each puzzle is titled and numbered and the word search words are in alphabetical order. I like these features! Scrambling of letters are at a moderate level, in my opinion.I took one star off of my review for the following two reasons:1. This huge book contains double puzzle pages (2 puzzles per page). I prefer a single puzzle on one page because it messed with my eyes and is distracting,.for me personally.*I tore a plain white page from the back of the book to use for covering the puzzle I am not working on. This really helps!2. The answer key is no longer available in this book itself. In the back of the book, a note states the key has been moved to online and provides a QR code to scan (see pic). For me personally, it's much simpler to flip to the back of a physical book, to get help if needed or to just check my work, rather than having to go online!Overall, I think key this huge book of large print word search puzzles is made well, affordable, has varied themes, & multiple puzzles. Good value for the price point!

raw_products.bookDescription:
Large Print Word Search Puzzle Book for Adults is the perfect mix of fun, relaxation, and brain-boosting challenge. Created specifically with easy-to-read print for adults and seniors. Whether you’re looking for a calming daily activity, a screen-free way to unwind, or a thoughtful gift for a loved one, this collection delivers hours of satisfying puzzle-solving.
Inside, you’ll find 125 large print word search puzzles across dozens of entertaining themes, so every puzzle feels fresh and engaging. With a mixed difficulty range, this book is great for both casual puzzlers and experienced word-search fans. Each puzzle is designed for comfortable reading on a spacious 8.5 x 11 page size, making it ideal for at-home relaxation, travel, waiting rooms, or quiet evenings.
Words may be hidden in every direction: forward, backward, diagonally, up, and down adding variety and challenge while still keeping the experience accessible and enjoyable. And when you’re ready to check your work, complete solutions are included in the back of the book.
